title: Cutter's Club
overview: A pair of young student doctors get involved in a secret society of surgery fetishists and monster makers called the "Cutters Club", overseen by the maddest of doctors. Creatures, carnage, mayhem and macabre malpractice combine in this maniacal movie, brought back from the brink of oblivion to take its rightful place as Todd's fevered cinematic swan song.
